releaseImpact.cloudFunctions: No runtime code change; formal release deploys only canonical link-free run snapshots, rechecks every CLI attempt after its fence, and waits for confirmed invoke cleanup.
releaseImpact.adminWeb: No runtime code change; formal release deploys only the canonical pinned snapshot and verifies the Aliyun archive plus its complete per-file manifest before switching current.
releaseImpact.miniprogram: No runtime code change; formal release may reuse only an exact identity derived from the fresh normalized actual upload receipt.
